title: Mine Reputation
description: A meme mod of Kingdom Come: Deliverance II
body:
The Mine Reputation mod is inspired by the player reputation notifications in the game _Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2_. When a player's reputation changes among villagers, an information prompt will appear. Players can also check their reputation with the villagers by observing the facial expression icons.

![Increase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7385fd634e09255171b5c354035f711c7942148a_0.webp)

![Decrease](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bea6f7cbe9856e00b9c912ccae7380a4967bccbc_0.webp)
